title: The Great Leaps
story: Sensei: "Why walk when you can fly? 0 to the line's dawn, $ to its dusk. gg to the summit, G to the roots."

challenges.intro: Dive to the river's mouth at the very bottom.
challenges.hint: G drops to the last line; w hops to the next word.

challenges.intro: Soar back to the peak, to the word at the line's end.
challenges.hint: gg flies to the first line, $ to the line's end.

boss.name: Sensei's Trial
boss.taunt: Show me the way of motion, student. The hourglass empties.

buffer: seek the stone within the garden
steps.hint: w hops word to word — stone is the third word.
G drops to the last line, then w to the final word.
0 jumps to the line's start; the first word is right there.
